scripts.check:validators: tsc src/utils/email-address.ts src/utils/email-address.selfcheck.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target es2022 --outDir /tmp/tempik-check && node /tmp/tempik-check/email-address.selfcheck.js
scripts.check:routes: tsc src/api/routes.selfcheck.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target es2022 --outDir /tmp/tempik-check && node /tmp/tempik-check/routes.selfcheck.js
